const BASE='';async function req(method,path,body){const res=await fetch(`${BASE}${path}`,{method,headers:body?{'Content-Type':'application/json'}:{},body:body?JSON.stringify(body):undefined});if(!res.ok){var _err$error;const err=await res.json().catch(()=>({error:res.statusText}));throw new Error((_err$error=err.error)!==null&&_err$error!==void 0?_err$error:`HTTP ${res.status}`);}return res.json();}// ── Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const settingsApi={get:()=>req('GET','/api/settings'),save:data=>req('POST','/api/settings',data)};// ── Tags ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const tagsApi={list:()=>req('GET','/api/tags'),create:tag=>req('POST','/api/tags',tag),update:(id,tag)=>req('PUT',`/api/tags/${id}`,tag),delete:id=>req('DELETE',`/api/tags/${id}`)};// ── Layouts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const layoutsApi={list:()=>req('GET','/api/layouts'),create:layout=>req('POST','/api/layouts',layout),update:(id,layout)=>req('PUT',`/api/layouts/${id}`,layout),delete:id=>req('DELETE',`/api/layouts/${id}`)};// ── Templates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const templatesApi={list:()=>req('GET','/api/templates'),create:t=>req('POST','/api/templates',t),update:(id,t)=>req('PUT',`/api/templates/${id}`,t),delete:id=>req('DELETE',`/api/templates/${id}`)};// ── Posts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const postsApi={list:()=>req('GET','/api/posts'),create:post=>req('POST','/api/posts',post),update:(id,post)=>req('PUT',`/api/posts/${id}`,post),delete:id=>req('DELETE',`/api/posts/${id}`)};// ── Autopost Queue ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const autopostApi={list:()=>req('GET','/api/autopost'),create:item=>req('POST','/api/autopost',item),update:(id,item)=>req('PUT',`/api/autopost/${id}`,item),delete:id=>req('DELETE',`/api/autopost/${id}`)};// ── Product fetch (via server — keeps API secrets safe) ───────────────────────
export const productApi={fetchAmazon:payload=>req('POST','/api/amazon/product',payload),fetchAliExpress:payload=>req('POST','/api/aliexpress/product',payload)};
